name: Why do some Siri features work on one iPhone but not another?
description: Not all Siri features are available on every device. Hardware support and app permissions can determine whether a command works.

mainEntity.name: Why do some Siri features work on one iPhone but not another?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your device and permissions matter most. Some advanced Siri capabilities depend on supported hardware, app access, and Apple account permissions, so a feature can be unavailable even when Siri itself is on. If a command fails, verify the related app permissions and whether your device supports that Siri function.
acceptedAnswer.description: Not all Siri features are available on every device. Hardware support and app permissions can determine whether a command works.
